Iron Man's bedroom smells fantastic. Especially when he lights scented candles, it's hard to leave.


Complete Sentences

Fragment

Iron Man's bedroom smells fantastic. (Complete sentence)

Especially when he lights scented candles, it's hard to leave. (Fragment - This is a dependent clause that cannot stand alone as a sentence. It needs to be connected to an independent clause to form a complete sentence.)

Are these complete sentences, or is one of them a fragment?
Spider-Man begged his neighbor to lend him platform shoes. Which were the hottest new fad at the disco club.


Complete Sentences

Fragment

Fragment. 

"Spider-Man begged his neighbor to lend him platform shoes." is a complete sentence.

"Which were the hottest new fad at the disco club." is a dependent clause fragment without a main clause. It cannot stand alone as a sentence.

"Because she trusts him." is a dependent clause fragment without a main clause. It cannot stand alone as a sentence.
